headline: How The NetApp (NTAP) Story Is Shifting With Memory Costs And Cautious Street Targets
summary: NetApp's modeled fair value has been trimmed slightly from US$117.93 to US$117.13 per share, a change of about 0.7% that captures a more cautious stance without a major reset. That small move lines up with recent Street research, where many firms are lowering targets on concerns around memory costs, even as they still acknowledge execution strengths and keep several targets above US$110. Read on to see how this mix of optimism and caution is shaping the evolving NetApp story and what signals...
